# Feature Spec: Data Persistence & Animations

**FEAT-ID**: FEAT-004  
**Plan**: plan_todo_app.md  
**Status**: In Progress

## Objective

Implement browser localStorage persistence so tasks survive page refreshes, and add smooth CSS animations for all state transitions to create a polished, professional user experience.

## Context

This is the final feature that completes the to-do app. It adds:
- localStorage synchronization for data persistence across browser sessions
- Smooth CSS transitions and animations for all interactions
- Initial load from localStorage
- Automatic save on every state change

The app will be fully functional after this feature, with pleasing animations using gray-tone aesthetics.

## Requirements

### Functional
- Save todos array to localStorage on every change (add, toggle, delete)
- Load todos from localStorage on initial page load
- Handle localStorage errors gracefully (quota exceeded, disabled localStorage)
- Data persists across browser sessions and page refreshes

### Non-Functional
- Smooth animations for all state transitions (0.2-0.4s duration)
- Fade-in animation for new tasks
- Slide-out animation for deleted tasks
- Transition for completion toggle (background, color, opacity changes)
- CSS transitions for hover effects
- No janky or abrupt UI changes

### Design Specifications

**Animation Timing:**
- Fast interactions: 0.2s (hover, focus)
- Medium transitions: 0.3s (task state changes)
- Slower animations: 0.4s (task appearance/deletion)

**Animation Easing:**
- ease-in-out for most transitions
- ease-out for appearing elements
- ease-in for disappearing elements

**LocalStorage Key:**
- Key: `todos-app-data`
- Value: JSON stringified array of task objects

## Tasks

### TASK-001: Implement LocalStorage Persistence Functions

**Implementation:**

Add localStorage utility functions at the top of the JavaScript section:

```javascript
// ===== LOCALSTORAGE UTILITIES =====
const STORAGE_KEY = 'todos-app-data';

/**
 * Loads todos from localStorage
 * @returns {Array} Array of task objects, or empty array if none found
 */
function loadFromStorage() {
  try {
    const data = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
    return data ? JSON.parse(data) : [];
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error loading from localStorage:', error);
    return [];
  }
}

/**
 * Saves todos to localStorage
 */
function saveToStorage() {
  try {
    localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(todos));
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error saving to localStorage:', error);
    // Handle quota exceeded or localStorage disabled
    if (error.name === 'QuotaExceededError') {
      console.warn('localStorage quota exceeded. Consider clearing old data.');
    }
  }
}
```

**Unit Tests:**
Manual verification (console testing):
- [ ] Call `loadFromStorage()` on fresh page, verify empty array
- [ ] Add tasks, call `saveToStorage()`, refresh page, call `loadFromStorage()`, verify tasks loaded
- [ ] Test with localStorage disabled (incognito mode in some browsers)
- [ ] Verify error handling logs to console without crashing

**Documentation Update:**
Add JSDoc comments (included above):
- Explain localStorage key structure
- Document error handling approach
- Note graceful degradation if localStorage fails

---

### TASK-002: Integrate LocalStorage with State Management

**Implementation:**

1. **Initialize todos from localStorage**:
   Update the state initialization:
   ```javascript
   // ===== STATE MANAGEMENT =====
   // Load initial todos from localStorage
   let todos = loadFromStorage();
   ```

2. **Save after every state change**:
   Update `addTask`, `toggleTask`, and `deleteTask` functions to call `saveToStorage()`:
   
   ```javascript
   function addTask(text) {
     if (!text || text.trim() === '') {
       return;
     }
     const task = createTask(text);
     todos.push(task);
     saveToStorage(); // Persist to localStorage
     renderTasks();
   }

   function toggleTask(taskId) {
     const task = todos.find(t => t.id === taskId);
     if (task) {
       task.completed = !task.completed;
       saveToStorage(); // Persist to localStorage
       renderTasks();
     }
   }

   function deleteTask(taskId) {
     todos = todos.filter(t => t.id !== taskId);
     saveToStorage(); // Persist to localStorage
     renderTasks();
   }
   ```

3. **Initial render**:
   Add at the end of the script (in initialization section):
   ```javascript
   // ===== INITIALIZATION =====
   // Initialize event listeners
   todoForm.addEventListener('submit', handleFormSubmit);

   // Render initial tasks from localStorage
   renderTasks();
   ```

**Unit Tests:**
Manual verification:
- [ ] Add tasks and refresh page — verify tasks persist
- [ ] Toggle task completion and refresh — verify state persists
- [ ] Delete task and refresh — verify deletion persists
- [ ] Open app in multiple tabs — verify changes sync after refresh
- [ ] Clear localStorage manually, refresh — verify app starts empty

**Documentation Update:**
Add comments explaining:
- Initial load from localStorage
- Automatic save on every mutation
- Why we call saveToStorage() before renderTasks() (ensure data is saved even if render fails)

---

### TASK-003: Add CSS Animations and Transitions

**Implementation:**

In the `<style>` section, add animation keyframes and update existing rules with transitions:

1. **Add keyframes at the end of the style section**:
   ```css
   /* ===== ANIMATIONS ===== */
   /* Fade-in animation for new tasks */
   @keyframes fadeIn {
     from {
       opacity: 0;
       transform: translateY(-10px);
     }
     to {
       opacity: 1;
       transform: translateY(0);
     }
   }
   ```

2. **Update `.todo-item` to include animation**:
   Find the `.todo-item` rule and add:
   ```css
   .todo-item {
     display: flex;
     align-items: center;
     padding: var(--spacing-md);
     border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border);
     background: var(--color-container);
     animation: fadeIn 0.3s ease-out;
     transition: background 0.3s, opacity 0.3s;
   }
   ```

3. **Update `.todo-text` with transition**:
   ```css
   .todo-text {
     flex: 1;
     color: var(--color-text-primary);
     font-size: 16px;
     word-break: break-word;
     transition: color 0.3s, text-decoration 0.3s;
   }
   ```

4. **Update button styles with transitions** (already has transition for color):
   Verify `button[type="submit"]` and `.delete-btn` have transitions:
   ```css
   button[type="submit"] {
     /* ... existing styles ... */
     transition: opacity 0.2s, background 0.2s;
   }

   .delete-btn {
     /* ... existing styles ... */
     transition: color 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
   }
   
   .delete-btn:hover {
     color: #d32f2f;
     transform: scale(1.1);
   }
   ```

5. **Update input focus transition**:
   ```css
   #todo-input {
     /* ... existing styles ... */
     transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
   }

   #todo-input:focus {
     outline: none;
     border-color: var(--color-accent);
     box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(158, 158, 158, 0.1);
   }
   ```

**Unit Tests:**
Manual verification:
- [ ] Add task — verify smooth fade-in animation
- [ ] Toggle task completion — verify smooth background/color transition
- [ ] Hover over delete button — verify scale effect
- [ ] Hover over Add button — verify opacity transition
- [ ] Focus input field — verify smooth border color and shadow transition
- [ ] All animations feel smooth, not jarring (no 0.5s+ durations)

**Documentation Update:**
Add CSS comments explaining:
- Animation keyframes and their purpose
- Transition properties and timing
- Easing choices (ease-out for appearance, ease-in-out for state changes)
- Performance considerations (animating transform and opacity, not width/height)

---

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Tasks persist across page refreshes
- [ ] Tasks load automatically on page load
- [ ] localStorage saves on every add, toggle, and delete operation
- [ ] App works gracefully if localStorage is disabled (degrades to session-only storage)
- [ ] All interactions include smooth animations:
  - New tasks fade in
  - Completion toggle smoothly transitions colors
  - Delete button scales on hover
  - Input focus has smooth highlight
- [ ] No jarring or abrupt UI changes
- [ ] Animation timing feels professional (0.2-0.4s range)
- [ ] All code documented with inline comments

## Testing Notes

Manual testing steps:
1. Open `index.html` fresh (clear localStorage first)
2. Add 3-5 tasks — verify fade-in animations
3. Toggle some tasks — verify smooth color transitions
4. Delete some completed tasks
5. Refresh the page — verify all tasks and their states persist
6. Open DevTools > Application > Local Storage — verify data is stored
7. Manually edit localStorage JSON, refresh, verify changes load
8. Clear localStorage, refresh, verify app starts empty
9. Test in private/incognito mode (some browsers disable localStorage)
10. Test all hover effects for smooth transitions
11. Test input focus for smooth border/shadow transition

## Out of Scope

- Export/import functionality
- Multiple task lists or categories
- Sync across devices (cloud storage)
- Undo/redo functionality
- Advanced animations (drag-and-drop, reordering)

## Dependencies

- FEAT-001 (HTML Structure & Base Styles) — complete
- FEAT-002 (Task Creation & Rendering) — complete
- FEAT-003 (Task State Management) — complete

## Notes

- localStorage has a 5-10MB limit (varies by browser), sufficient for thousands of tasks
- Using JSON.stringify/parse for simple serialization (adequate for this data structure)
- Error handling ensures app doesn't crash if localStorage is disabled or quota exceeded
- CSS animations use transform and opacity for best performance (GPU-accelerated)
- @keyframes fadeIn provides reusable animation for future enhancements
- Transition durations chosen based on Google Material Design guidelines (sub-400ms for most UI transitions)
